title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> If they uncover the hidden escape rou
content:
✔ If they uncover the hidden escape route, they can bypass the challenge entirely by feeding Cerberus.

📜 Final Challenge: “The Gates of the Underworld”
✔ Modeled after the trials of Odysseus, Dante, and Orpheus.
✔ A rapid-fire gauntlet of literary analysis, close reading, argumentation, and creative application.
✔ Winners receive a final grade boost, a unique class title, and one extra assignment exemption.

📜 Secret Escape Route: “Buying Cerberus a Treat”
✔ Somewhere in the syllabus (or during the semester), a hidden Easter egg clue will reference feeding Cerberus.
✔ If a student finds this and presents “the treat” at the right moment, they bypass the final challenge.
✔ The treat can be anything symbolic—a written argument, a reference, or even a meta-textual joke.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 213 (chunk 213/555)
